monitor_the_situation.title: — S3 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 4m ago. Multiple tankers hit in the Strait of Hormuz as Iran observes mourning for Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, raising security concerns at the strategic chokepoint.
Massive Protest Erupts in Qom, Iran
— S3 · Political · Qom, Iran · 3h ago. Thousands protest in Iran's holy city of Qom as nationwide unrest continues following Khamenei's funeral.
Iran Threatens to Block Ships in Strait of Hormuz After Missile Strikes
— S3 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 4h ago. Iran may block ships in the Strait of Hormuz following missile strikes on two vessels, as UKMTO advised use of a US-controlled corridor.
Suspects Attack Border Police at Kalandiya Checkpoint
